description: A representation of the data stored inside of the curses.json file

curses.description: an array containing all recognized curse-words

curseFreeMessage.description: message printed when a user curse total is requested and they have not cursed

userFirstSwearMessage.description: message printed when a user swears for the first time

serverNoSwearMessage.description: message printed when a when checking curse totals on a server that has not had any curse words

userMilestones.description: an object containing all of the user-specific curse word milestones

serverMilestones.description: an object containing all server-specific curse word milestones

botResponses.description: an array containing all of the bot responses to being pinged
